name: social-content
description: Draft LinkedIn posts, Reels / TikTok scripts, or newsletter sections in your voice, sourced from a course-builder run, a workshop-builder run, a newsletter issue, or a free-form topic. Aggregates LinkedIn / Reels drafts into per-template posts/<template>-post.md files (newest at top); newsletter sections write to posts/<slug>-newsletter.md and can be injected directly into a newsletter pre-draft. Optional infographic spec or drawio diagram on request.
